data.title: Insurity launches Partner Program with 200+ partners for scalable growth in insurance industry.
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut, Insurity, a prominent provider of cloud-based software for property and casualty insurance, introduced its latest Partner Program. This initiative aims to enhance cooperation within Insurity's network of over 200 partners, encompassing system integrators, technology providers, and insurance content and service collaborators. The program offers insurers access to a diverse range of partners, strengthening their capabilities and overall offerings in the industry.

data.title: Hundreds of flights canceled as airlines prepare for powerful winter storm with frigid weather affecting entire country.
data.description: Numerous flights are being canceled by airlines over the upcoming weekend as a precaution due to freezing temperatures and icy conditions spreading throughout many regions in the country. Hundreds of flights are affected by these cancellations.

data.title: Baseten secures $300M in Series E funding, valued at $5B, with investors like CapitalG, IVP, NVIDIA, Altimeter, and more, following Series D.
data.description: A San Francisco-based company, Baseten, has successfully secured $300 million in their Series E funding round, valuing the company at $5 billion. This funding was backed by prominent investors including CapitalG, IVP, NVIDIA, Altimeter, Battery Ventures, among others. Notably, this achievement comes just three months after the company closed its Series D round.

data.title: HCLTech to acquire Finergic Solutions Pte Ltd to enhance digital transformation services for wealth management industry.
data.description: In a recent announcement from HCL Technologies, it was revealed that the company has finalized a deal to acquire Finergic Solutions Pte Ltd. The agreement outlines the acquisition of Finergic Solutions by HCLTech. The acquisition marks a significant move for HCLTech in expanding its portfolio and market presence. This development is indicative of HCLTech's strategic growth plans and commitment to enhancing its offerings. The undisclosed financial details of the deal have not been disclosed to the public yet.

data.title: Fifth Third Bank earns 5-star rating from USA Today for best customer service in financial services. Chief operating officer Jamie Leonard expresses gratitude.
data.description: A financial services company, Fifth Third (Nasdaq: FITB), based in Cincinnati, achieved a 5-star rating in the first America’s Best Customer Service for Financial Services study by USA Today. This rating positions Fifth Third among the top companies in the financial services industry for providing exceptional customer service. Jamie Leonard, the Chief Operating Officer at Fifth Third, expressed gratitude for the acknowledgment, emphasizing that such accolades are especially meaningful when they originate from customers themselves. The company's commitment to being a relationship-focused bank underscores its dedication to prioritizing customer satisfaction.

data.title: Operation HOPE and City of Memphis extend Dream Forward movement, with summit on April 4, 2025, followed by Atlanta meeting.
data.description: In Atlanta, Operation HOPE and the City of Memphis revealed that the Dream Forward summit, which took place on April 4, 2025, in Memphis, progressed further during the recent Annual Meeting of the HOPE Global Forums. This summit aimed to promote an ambitious, comprehensive economic strategy for the nation, drawing inspiration from Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s legacy. The Atlanta event marked a significant step in continuing the discussions initiated at the National Civil Rights Mus, with important numbers highlighting the collective effort to shape a more inclusive economic future for America.

data.title: Silver surpasses $100/ounce fueled by solar demand and supply squeeze, adding $2.83T in 3 months. Bitcoin drops 30% from $126k to $89k.
data.description: On Friday, the price of silver surpassed $100 per ounce due to high demand for solar panels and a shortage in supply. In comparison, Bitcoin's value dropped by 30% from its peak of $126,000 to $89,000. The numbers show that the market value of silver skyrocketed from $2.73 trillion on October 31, 2025, when it was priced at $48.68 per ounce, to approximately $5.56 trillion on Friday. This represents a 104% increase in just three months, with $2.83 trillion being added to silver's total value. The total global supply of silver is estimated at around 56 billion ounces, including various products. This increase in silver's value is 1.5 times greater than the entire market capitalization of Bitcoin, which stands at $1.84 trillion. Bitcoin, on the other hand, fell from its high above $126,000.

data.title: Brazil's Blau Farmacêutica develops advanced biosimilar immunotherapy, achieving milestone with ANVISA approval for drug substance GMP.
data.description: Blau Farmacêutica, a pharmaceutical firm in Brazil, has recently secured GMP approval for its drug substance from ANVISA. This development, coupled with advancements in international regulatory processes, could significantly enhance cancer immunotherapy accessibility in Brazil. The company, which is listed on the Brazilian Stock Market, is spearheading this innovative change in healthcare. The approval signals a major milestone in transforming cancer treatment in the country, potentially impacting a significant number of patients.

data.title: Dow Jones dropped 250 points as Intel earnings fall, while Nasdaq turned higher despite the slump.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index fell by 250 points after experiencing a two-day increase driven by the Greenland deal. Intel faced a significant drop in its stock value due to earnings. Despite this, the Nasdaq managed to recover from Intel's decline and saw an increase. This event was covered live by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the mixed performance in the stock market for the day.
